lever.summary: Process two adjacent packed-B NR panels per MR row tile in the blocked GEMM macro-kernel

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Each output element still accumulates pc blocks in ascending pc order and l=0..kc in ascending order inside each pc block; grouping adjacent column panels only reorders independent output columns.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: No comparisons or tie-breaking behavior in matmul_2d.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: No FMA, mixed precision, horizontal reduction, or reassociation per output element.

validation.test_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-o84i1-test cargo test -p fj-lax --lib matmul_2d -- --nocapture
validation.test_result: passed: 9 passed, 0 failed, 1 ignored, 1163 filtered out

benchmark.baseline_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1293453 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1293453 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-o84i1-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/matmul_2d_2048' --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 2 --measurement-time 10
benchmark.after_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1293453 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1293453 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-o84i1-after cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/matmul_2d_2048' --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 2 --measurement-time 10

decision.reason: Median improved by about 5.6 percent, but conservative same-worker interval failed and Score 1.0 is below the required 2.0 keep gate. Source was restored.
decision.next_primitive: True packed-A slab plus JC-blocked macro-kernel or another cache-oblivious GEMM primitive that reduces memory traffic more substantially while preserving per-output ascending-k accumulation.
